$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: S225 cross-track merge — types bumped 8→11 to absorb the 3 main-track S224 W4-IMPL handler types in `lib/queue/handlers/bid-draft-all.ts` (`BidDraftAllQuestionResult`, `BidDraftAllResult`, `BidDraftAllAuthContext`). Same precedent as S31 W4's SKIP on `lib/queue/enqueue.ts` types — main-track owns §5.4 queue handler authoring contracts which are exported for `lib/queue/dispatch.ts` consumption + test mocking shape parity (V_W4 verifier note: "3 unused exported types in `bid-draft-all.ts` — W4-C tests consume"). Prior kh-prod-readiness-S31 W4 — OPS-50 Wave B Knip baseline cleanup. Sub-bucket 1 (BACKWARD-COMPAT-REEXPORT delete): trimmed 5 re-export blocks. Sub-bucket 2 (PUBLIC-API @public marking): added knip.config.ts `tags: ['-public']` rule and marked ~225 entries with @public JSDoc. Sub-bucket 3 (GENUINELY-DEAD delete): removed dead types/schemas. Skipped lib/queue/enqueue.ts and 2 bid-template routes per main-track S223 ownership. 8 types remaining at S31 close: 6 barrel-style `export type { X }` re-exports left alone per memory feedback_three_doc_growth_dynamic; 2 in lib/queue/enqueue.ts (S223 territory).
